# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

Prevent istio sidecar injection disabled.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.serviceName }}
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.serviceName }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.serviceName }}
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Values.containerName }}
        image: "{{ .Values.image }}"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.serviceName }}
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.serviceName }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.serviceName }}
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Values.containerName }}
        image: "{{ .Values.image }}"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
